display.label: Serialized tracing span context field
display.description: The name of the field containing java.util.Properties representation of serialized span context. Defaults to 'tracingspancontext' Default: tracingspancontext

display.label: Tracing operation name
display.description: The operation name representing Debezium processing span. Default is 'debezium-read' Default: debezium-read

display.label: Trace only events with context field present
display.description: Set to `true` when only events that have serialized context field should be traced. Default: false
